text.message: please be mindful about nb/ns deals (don't trade with leader)
didn't you tell us not to trade the leader?
that was perfect nb by red btw
nah I mean it was all good
so, 2 roads is win for blue

if I roll a 5, we can talk
that is the best I could do
don't think you would give me free cards there
yeah maybe wood but it was not enough
